```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "input must be an iterable"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns True if at least one element in the iterable is truthy",
    "returns False if all elements in the iterable are falsy",
    "returns a boolean value"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "input is an empty iterable",
    "input contains only falsy values",
    "input contains at least one truthy value"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.hf:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "iterable must be an iterable",
    "iterable must not be empty"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns True if bool(x) is True for any x in the iterable",
    "returns False if bool(x) is False for all x in the iterable"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "iterable with no elements: returns False",
    "iterable with all falsy elements: returns False",
    "iterable with at least one truthy element: returns True"
  ]
}
```
